product_goal: Create the first safe foundation for Реестр свойств inside ProcessMap Analytics.
critical_rules: Do not replace Analytics with Реестр действий.
Do not replace Analytics with Реестр свойств.
No fake property rows or counts.
Use real source-proven data only, otherwise honest foundation state.
No backend/schema/BPMN/Product Actions/RAG runtime changes out of scope.

worker_split.worker_2: Implementation lane: wire Analytics module and page shell, real data only if source-proven.
worker_split.worker_3: Independent source-truth and UX checklist lane, no product code.

branch_hygiene.worker_2_requirement: Use clean worktree/branch from origin/main or document why current checkout is safe.
